publishedAbstract: - Quay deployment is unreachable, and running the command `oc logs-n quay-registry | grep "DistributedStorage"` shows: 2023-12-19T17:07:41.091133945Z time="2023-12-19T17:07:41Z" level=debug msg="Validating DistributedStorage" 2023-12-19T17:07:44.106809931Z time="2023-12-19T17:07:44Z" level=debug msg="DistributedStorage%!(EXTRA string=Could not connect to storage local_us. Error: context deadline exceeded, []string= [DISTRIBUTED_STORAGE_CONFIG])" 2023-12-19T17:07:44.110685682Z | DistributedStorage | Could not connect to storage local_us. Error: context deadline exceeded
publishedTitle: Quay Registry App pods down with CrashLoopBackOff
